summary: Comprehensive testing of Thrifty Curator reselling app completed. Backend API fully functional (100% pass rate), frontend core features working correctly with minor dropdown interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown select components have interaction issues - options not clickable via automation
ui_bugs.details: ShadCN Select components may need improved test selectors or the dropdowns might need force=True clicks with better waiting

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all elements (logo, platform links, form links, TikTok link, share button)
All platform links (eBay, Poshmark, Mercari, Depop, Facebook Marketplace) open correctly with target='_blank'
TikTok link opens correct URL with proper security attributes
Job Application form submission - complete flow including success page
Employee dashboard - clock in/out functionality working
Employee dashboard - time tracking and statistics display
Admin dashboard - view all employee data
Admin dashboard - statistics and tables display correctly
Complete backend API testing (16/16 tests passed)
All form endpoints accept and process data correctly
JWT authentication working for both employee and admin roles
Time tracking API endpoints functioning properly
